name: Kakuro
short_description: Kakuro is one of the most popular puzzle games of all time. A great game for training your brain.
detailed_description:
Kakuro is one of the most popular puzzle games of all time. A great game for training your brain.

You need to enter one number from 1 to 9 in all available cells so that, firstly, the sum of the numbers in each block matches the specified number, and secondly, so that in each block all the numbers are different.

The popular Japanese puzzle game Kakuro is based on the logical arrangement of numbers. All you need is your brain and the ability to concentrate.

  • The game contains 900 levels of varying difficulty and size.

  • In-game hint system

  • Saving level progress

  • Relaxing background music

  • Beautiful space game design

  • Music volume settings, sound effects and screen resolution

  • Simple, user-friendly interface

supported_languages: Russian, English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Portuguese - Brazil, Vietnamese, Danish, Indonesian, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Dutch, Norwegian, Portuguese - Portugal, Ukrainian, Finnish, Swedish, Japanese
